uniform_offset: every six minutes from :05 past the hour
nonuniform_evendiv: every other minute from :03 through :59 past the hour
uneven: every seven minutes from the top of the hour through :56
reasoning: Case 1 needs only start+step (clean wrap). Cases 2–3 need an explicit end because the trailing gap differs from the step; the end is the last value before the step would overflow 59. Case 1 uses the existing natural form but drops 'five minutes' in favour of the colon notation for consistency with cases 2–3; kept 'five minutes past the hour' form is also acceptable. Case 2 uses 'every other minute' (step=2 has idiomatic English). Case 3 uses 'top of the hour' for :00, which is idiomatic and unambiguous. Confidence docked one point because the colon-digit notation (:03, :56) is conventional in cron contexts but not in all plain-English registers.
